name_cn:
Chanel 23p CF Sequin Bag
Size: 20(cm)
23p Limited new classic CF sequin bag In stock
Sequin, shiny ✨ Sequin, a focal point 🤩🤩
This bag is simply a combination of all Chanel classic elements
Chain bag, double C logo, love at first sight!💘 When I saw it for the first time, I always miss him ❤️
Can be carried by hand, crossbody, on the side, or on the shoulder
Simply a perfect versatile bag! 😄 Soft and comfortable to the touch, love it
Beautiful explosion~ The crossbody length is okay, and it can also be carried by hand
Super beautiful, temperament score is full
The whole bag also has a certain thickness
